strengths: 15+ years of multi-stack engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, matching the required experience profile for a Principal-level IC role
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq — directly relevant to the AI strategy focus
Founder of GISCollective, an open-source Kubernetes-deployable platform serving real NGO users, demonstrating entrepreneurial drive and end-to-end product ownership
concerns: No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, which is listed as preferred
Cloud breadth shown mainly through AWS CDK and Kubernetes rather than a recognized portfolio of large-scale cloud platform strategy work
Public profile centers on craftsmanship and workshops rather than Director-level industry-wide AI thought leadership

key_factors.factor: Hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling experience
15+ years across software, infrastructure, and embedded engineering
Founder-level entrepreneurial ownership of an open-source platform

response.justification: Bogdan brings the 15-year multi-domain engineering depth the role requires, paired with current, hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks — exactly the cutting-edge AI builder fluency the job calls for. His founding and continued stewardship of GISCollective, a Kubernetes-deployable open-source GIS platform used by real NGOs, evidences the entrepreneurial, startup-style drive prized for this Principal IC seat, while prior roles at Sociomantic (millions of req/sec), RIDE Capital, and National Instruments show he can operate from low-latency infrastructure to regulated fintech to engineering tooling. Combined with a consistent record of teaching, workshops, and conference talks, he fits the profile of a technically fluent builder who can also inspire teams and customers around disruptive AI and cloud directions.
